pokemon:toedscool.name: Toedscool
pokemon:toedscool.summary: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.
Though it looks like Tentacool, Toedscool is a completely different species. Its legs may be thin, but it can run at a speed of 30 mph.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.

pokemon:toedscruel.name: Toedscruel
pokemon:toedscruel.summary: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.
It coils its 10 tentacles around prey and sucks out their nutrients, causing the prey pain. The folds along the rim of its head are a popular delicacy.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach.
